description: Autonomous MCP agent for grad school applications: prof discovery, cold emails, SOP, tracking.
name: io.github.i-ninte/grad-agent

environmentVariables.description: Anthropic API key used by Claude Haiku for hook synthesis and verification.
environmentVariables.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: SMTP host for the review mailer.
environmentVariables.name: SMTP_SERVER

environmentVariables.description: SMTP username; used as From address by default.
environmentVariables.name: SMTP_USERNAME

environmentVariables.description: SMTP password. Gmail App Password recommended.
environmentVariables.name: SMTP_PASSWORD

environmentVariables.description: Envelope From address for drafts emailed to the user's review inbox.
environmentVariables.name: SMTP_FROM

environmentVariables.description: Optional. Personal access token used to enumerate the user's public and private GitHub repos during catalog sync.
environmentVariables.name: GITHUB_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Optional. HuggingFace token used to enumerate the user's published models and datasets during catalog sync.
environmentVariables.name: HF_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Optional. Override the default ~/.grad-agent/ location for profile, programs, secrets, and data.
environmentVariables.name: GRAD_AGENT_HOME

title: grad-agent
